Το έμπειρο προσωπικό μας σας υποδέχεται σε ένα ζεστό και φιλικό περιβάλλον και σας προσφέρει υψηλού επιπέδου ιατρικές, διαγνωστικές και νοσηλευτικές, υπηρεσίες. Αξιόπιστη ιατρική φροντίδα Ακολουθούμε τα πρότυπα ποιότητας που επιβάλλουν οι τεχνολογικές εξελίξεις στο πεδίο της σύγχρονης ιατρικής. Προσιτές τιμές Για εμάς οι διαγνωστικές και νοσηλευτικές υπηρεσίες υψηλής ποιότητας δεν αποτελούν πολυτέλεια για λίγους. Φιλικό περιβάλλον Το προσωπικό μας είναι πάντα δίπλα σας με κατανόηση και ενσυναίσθηση και σας βοηθά με όλες τις διατυπώσεις, αιτήσεις στα ταμεία κ.λπ. Στοιχεία επικοινωνίας Διεύθυνση: Λεμεσού 39-41 (κάθετος Αχαρνών 209), Τ.Κ. 104 46, Αθήνα Τηλ.: 210 866 3064 Email: info@hospitalityclinic.gr Βρείτε μας στον Χάρτη Επικοινωνήστε μαζί μας Αποστολή φόρμας First Name Η HOSPITALity διαθέτει το κατάλληλο επιστημονικό και διοικητικό προσωπικό και τις απαραίτητες διαδικασίες, ώστε να μπορούν οι ασθενείς, ακόμη και όσοι δυσκολεύονται λόγω γλώσσας ή εμπειρίας, να αξιοποιήσουν όλες τις παροχές που τους παρέχει το σύστημα υγείας χωρίς την αίσθηση πως είναι ξένοι. h = canvasBody.height = window.innerHeight; } const opts = { particleColor: "rgb(223,0,36)", lineColor: "rgb(223,0,36)", particleAmount: 100, defaultSpeed: 0.5, variantSpeed: 0.5, defaultRadius: 2, variantRadius: 2, linkRadius: 200, }; window.addEventListener("resize", function(){ deBouncer(); }); let deBouncer = function() { clearTimeout(tid); tid = setTimeout(function() { resizeReset(); }, delay); }; let checkDistance = function(x1, y1, x2, y2){ return Math.sqrt(Math.pow(x2 - x1, 2) + Math.pow(y2 - y1, 2)); }; let linkPoints = function(point1, hubs){ for (let i = 0; i < hubs.length; i++) { let distance = checkDistance(point1.x, point1.y, hubs[i].x, hubs[i].y); let opacity = 1 - distance / opts.linkRadius; if (opacity > 0) { drawArea.lineWidth = 0.5; drawArea.strokeStyle = `rgba(${rgb[0]}, ${rgb[1]}, ${rgb[2]}, ${opacity})`; drawArea.beginPath(); drawArea.moveTo(point1.x, point1.y); drawArea.lineTo(hubs[i].x, hubs[i].y); drawArea.closePath(); drawArea.stroke(); } } } Particle = function(xPos, yPos){ this.x = Math.random() * w; this.y = Math.random() * h; this.speed = opts.defaultSpeed + Math.random() * opts.variantSpeed; this.directionAngle = Math.floor(Math.random() * 360); this.color = opts.particleColor; this.radius = opts.defaultRadius + Math.random() * opts. variantRadius; this.vector = { x: Math.cos(this.directionAngle) * this.speed, y: Math.sin(this.directionAngle) * this.speed }; this.update = function(){ this.border(); this.x += this.vector.x; this.y += this.vector.y; }; this.border = function(){ if (this.x >= w || this.x <= 0) { this.vector.x *= -1; } if (this.y >= h || this.y <= 0) { this.vector.y *= -1; } if (this.x > w) this.x = w; if (this.y > h) this.y = h; if (this.x < 0) this.x = 0; if (this.y < 0) this.y = 0; }; this.draw = function(){ drawArea.beginPath(); drawArea.arc(this.x, this.y, this.radius, 0, Math.PI*2); drawArea.closePath(); drawArea.fillStyle = this.color; drawArea.fill(); }; }; function setup(){ particles = []; resizeReset(); for (let i = 0; i < opts.particleAmount; i++){ particles.push( new Particle() ); } window.requestAnimationFrame(loop); } function loop(){ window.requestAnimationFrame(loop); drawArea.clearRect(0,0,w,h); for (let i = 0; i < particles.length; i++){ particles[i].update(); particles[i].draw(); } for (let i = 0; i < particles.length; i++){ linkPoints(particles[i], particles); } } const canvasBody = document.getElementById("canvas"), drawArea = canvasBody.getContext("2d"); let delay = 200, tid, rgb = opts.lineColor.match(/\d+/g); resizeReset(); setup();

At HOSPITALity General Clinic, in a warm and friendly environment, you will be welcomed by people who understand your needs, in our outpatient clinics or, if necessary, in the Emergency Department, in the short-term hospital unit or in the model long-term hospital unit in the center of Athens. There they will offer you high quality medical services of all specialties. You can also do all the necessary tests (hematological, microbiological, biochemical, hormonal, immunological, check-up, Covid-19 test, radiodiagnostic, mammography, etc.), as well as get vaccinated. Services / Departments HOSPITALity has the following departments: Pathology, Cardiology, Pulmonology, Orthopedic, General Surgery, ENT, Dermatology, Endocrinology, Rheumatology Clinics HOSPITALity's outpatient clinics has the following departments: Pathology, Cardiology, Orthopedic, Pulmonology, Nephrology, Neurology, Gastroenterology, Gynecology, Urology, Oncology, Pulmonology, Diabetes - Endocrinology, Rheumatology, Surgery and Plastic Surgery, ENT, Dermatology. Specialized clinics also operate: Sleep Study Clinic, Sports Injuries, Hearing and Vertigo Clinic, Anal. In HOSPITALity’s imaging departments, a full radiodiagnostic check is carried out with the help of modern machines and state-of-the-art equipment. Operations are carried out through affordable EOPYY (National Organization for Health Services Provision) packages in the ultra-modern operating rooms, which follow all the sterilization and disinfection guidelines and are ISO-certified. They are fully equipped and advanced, because each patient is different and each treatment is individualized and guided by the application of the safest possible technique, in order to painlessly provide the best results. The Director of the Department is Dr. Liagkos Th. Georgios, MD, PhD, graduate from the Faculty of Medicine of the University of Patras and PhD with Honors from the University of Athens. He is a General Surgeon & Proctologist and is specialized in Operating Anal Disorders, is certified in the use of Laser in Proctology and has received postgraduate specialization in Laparoscopic – Endoscopic Surgery. back to top Departments Pathology Departments Surgery Departments Specialized Units Diagnostic Departments HOSPITALity General Clinic Outpatient clinics The Membership card that takes care of you The services Stress Test Heart Triplex Microbiological - Biochemical Test General body ultrasounds Spirometry Digital mammography Easy access The clinic operates in the area of Agios Nikolaos, Acharnes, at 39-41 Lemesou Street, perpendicular to 209 Acharnon Street.
